title: Chunking with Overlap
description: Implement a text chunker with configurable size and overlap.
problem: Write chunk_text(text, chunk_size, overlap) that splits text into chunks of chunk_size words with overlap words shared between adjacent chunks. Returns a list of strings.
starter_code:
def chunk_text(text, chunk_size=10, overlap=2):
    words = text.split()
    # Split into chunks of chunk_size with overlap between adjacent chunks
    return []  # fix this
hint: Step through words with stride = chunk_size - overlap. Each chunk is words[i:i+chunk_size].

test_cases.label: Basic chunking
test_cases.call: chunk_text('a b c d e f g h i j', 5, 0)

test_cases.label: With overlap
test_cases.call: chunk_text('a b c d e f g h', 4, 2)
